content:
FINAL IVX IA SENIOR DEVELOPER CLOSEOUT — EXECUTE NOW

Current blocker:
Senior Developer is built and live, but self-proof cannot complete because production GITHUB_TOKEN returned 401 Bad credentials.

MISSION:
Finish IVX IA Senior Developer end-to-end with real commit → push → deploy → verify proof.

DO NOT RETURN NARRATIVE.
DO NOT MARK VERIFIED WITHOUT PROOF LEDGER.

EXECUTE:

1. Audit current Senior Developer state:
   - /health
   - /version
   - /api/ivx/senior-developer/status
   - /api/ivx/senior-developer/features
   - /api/ivx/senior-developer/self-proof/latest

2. Fix GitHub token issue:
   - Check GITHUB_TOKEN presence.
   - Check token has repo scope for ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest.
   - If token returns 401, report exact failure.
   - If token works, continue.

3. Run one real owner-approved proof task:
   - inspect files
   - apply safe change
   - run tests
   - commit to GitHub main
   - trigger Render deploy
   - verify /health
   - verify /version matches GitHub SHA
   - write proof ledger

4. Verify Senior Developer capabilities:
   - plan
   - diff
   - approve
   - run
   - deploy
   - proof
   - rollback
   - owner gate

5. Verify Rork is not required:
   - no Rork runtime calls
   - no toolkit.rork.com runtime dependency
   - IVX provider chain works
   - OpenAI/Anthropic fallback works

6. Verify app surfaces:
   - Owner Chat
   - Developer Workspace
   - Android
   - iOS
   - Web

FINAL REPORT ONLY:

STATE:
ROOT_CAUSE:
FILES_CHANGED:
TESTS_RUN:
GITHUB_TOKEN_STATUS:
GITHUB_SHA:
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
LIVE_HEALTH:
LIVE_VERSION:
SENIOR_DEVELOPER_STATUS:
OWNER_GATE_STATUS:
SELF_PROOF_STATUS:
RORK_DEPENDENCY_STATUS:
ANDROID_STATUS:
IOS_STATUS:
WEB_STATUS:
PROOF_LEDGER:
BLOCKERS:
FINAL_STATUS:

RULE:
FINAL_STATUS = VERIFIED only when a real owner-approved Senior Developer task commits to GitHub, deploys to Render, verifies live, and saves proof ledger.
If GITHUB_TOKEN still returns 401, FINAL_STATUS = BLOCKED_ON_GITHUB_TOKEN.
